reason: Creating one tile per link when a text selection holds several URLs is a functional addition to LinkTargetService, not a redesign. The UI diff only swaps the single CreateTarget call in the orb/add-tile drop path for the new CreateTargets list, feeding the existing AddTargets flow. Wheel geometry, colours, animations and layout are untouched. The rest of the diff is LinkTargetService (CreateTargets/ExtractAll, plain-text scan with path de-dup) and tests. No new screen or visual language was introduced, so there is nothing for a mockup set to compare against.
